summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Transmill v2.38.19 - Bug Fixes P0/P1. All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: P1 Bugfix verified: SolicitacoesLabelviewPage.js correctly uses optional chaining (?.) and 'N/A' fallbacks for undefined fields
P0 Bugfix verified: CotacaoConsultorLabelview.js uses consistent field access (custo_mensal > valor_base > valor) for plan values
Login page correctly uses dark green color #293618 as specified
Admin master login correctly redirects to /admin/franquias based on user_type='master' and is_labelview_master=true
Dashboard statistics API (/api/admin/franquias/stats) returns correct data structure with totalFranquias, franquiasAtivas, saldoBolsao
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transmill v2.38.19 testing complete. All P0/P1 bugfixes verified: 1) Login page has dark green #293618 background, 2) Admin master redirects to /admin/franquias, 3) Dashboard shows correct statistics (1 franquia ativa, R$ 1.500,00 saldo bolsão), 4) Solicitações page has no TypeError - fields show 'N/A' fallback for missing data, 5) API /api/version returns v2.38.19, 6) API /api/admin/franquias/stats returns data correctly

frontend_tests.description: Login page has dark green #293618 background
Email, password inputs and submit button present
Dashboard shows Franquias Ativas, Saldo Bolsão, Total Clientes, Receita do Mês
Missing fields show 'N/A' fallback (P1 bugfix verified)

features_verified.dashboard_estatisticas_corretas: ✅ PASS - Dashboard shows: 1 Franquia Ativa, R$ 1.500,00 Saldo Bolsão, 0 Clientes, R$ 0,00 Receita

features_verified.solicitacoes_fallback_na: ✅ PASS - Missing fields show 'N/A' (telefone, veículo, placa, contrato, plano)
